items.title: Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty hints at lower start amid muted global cues; Asian markets down
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty was trading at 25,719.5 levels, down by 131.5 points, indicating a lower start amid muted global cues.

items.title: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery IPO opens Feb 24: Check price band, size, dates
items.description: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery IPO, which opens on Feb 24, 2026, has set a price band of ₹367-386. Read to find out  IPO lot size, issue size, likely listing date and objectives
